message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "loggedInOrgAdmin" as admin1
participant "frontend" as frontend1
participant "UserController" as controller1
participant "UserService" as service1
participant "AclUpdateHelper" as aclHelper1

actor "loggedInOrgAdmin" as admin2
participant "frontend" as frontend2
participant "UserController" as controller2
participant "UserService" as service2
participant "AclUpdateHelper" as aclHelper2

admin1 -> frontend1 : add coach role for myself
frontend1 -> controller1 : addCoachRoleToOrgAdmin(org_id)
controller1 -> service1 : addCoachRoleToLoggedInUser(org_id) (Check user is org admin)
service1 -> aclHelper1 : add acl permission to user

admin2 -> frontend2 : add coach role for myself
frontend2 -> controller2 : addCoachRoleToOrgAdmin(org_id)
controller2 -> service2 : addCoachRoleToLoggedInUser(org_id) (Check user is org admin)
service2 -> aclHelper2 : add acl permission to user

@enduml
